content:
AnnouncementThe Chromium OS Development Consulting service from Wayne Inc. has been officially acquired by TT Corporation.
Safe and easy-to-manage PC for public use#We offer private label OS (based on Chromium OS) & UEM (Unified Endpoint Management) for customer’s business that requires more than the Wayne OS free version.
Why Chromium OS ODM Development?#Own brand OS Unlimited license for your organization/business Low-cost than in-sourcing Vendor neutral DevOps Service included#Private label OS customization & update UEM server development & deployment on clound or on-premise Quality assurance Open source compliance Technical support Hardware usage example#Interactive KioskIntel/AMD x86-64 processor, 2GB+ RAM, 10GB+ HDD/SSD POP (Point of Production) device in smart factory Secure information search PC in public place Interactive board in school PCIntel/AMD x86-64 processor, 2GB+ RAM, 10GB+ HDD/SSD An alternative to Chromebook in schools Turns Low-end/2nd-hand PCs into lightweight PCs Internet PCs for Network segmentation USB3-in-1 (OS booting, OS installation, removable storage) USB Functions as OS when booted on a PC, and as a removable storage when connected to a running PC (Windows/MacOS) Use case#PreviousNextThe Process of Chromium OS Development#ProcessDiscussion Discuss about the OS & UEM requirements through online/offline meeting. Contract The total price is based on requirements. Typically, it requires 1-3 man-months. Development We develop & test the OS, server, repo, doc. Deployment If no issues occurred, customer will decide to proceed the ODM OS, then pay the balance to us. Update We update SW/docs if necessary. Tech support We offer online/offline tech support for operation/in-sourcing on customer’s side.
title: Chromium OS Development Consulting

content:
Live USB#A popular method of installing an OS on a USB flash drive (portable removable storage). However, the OS cannot coexist with the storage partition.
Our technology#We have core technology that solves this issue. It can be applied to all live USBs without additional SW/plugins, using only MBR and GPT partition standards.
Application#Linux affiliation OS: Chromium OS, Debian, Red Hat, etc. Removable storage: USB flash drives, SD cards
title: Improved Live USB
